title: The End of the Beginning?
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to know about this week
The White House may have backtracked on some tariffs, due to market pressures, but we aren't back to "normal". Business uncertainty will likely persist for the medium term. Having said that, we now know that markets will "check" some of the White House's decisions.
